Legal

Privacy Policy

Your privacy matters to us. Here's how we handle your information with care and transparency.

Privacy Policy

At PADUP Foundation, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website and make a donation.

1. Information We Collect

When you donate or contact us, we collect personal information such as your name, email address, and billing details.

2. Payment Processing Security

All financial transactions are securely processed through our authorized payment gateway, Flutterwave.

PADUP Foundation does not store, view, or retain your credit/debit card numbers or bank account login credentials on our servers.

Flutterwave securely encrypts and processes all payment data in accordance with internationally recognized PCI-DSS security standards.

3. How We Use Your Information

We use your information solely to:

  • Process voluntary donations
  • Issue electronic donation receipts
  • Share updates about PADUP Foundation's projects and community impact
  • Comply with applicable financial regulations and anti-money laundering requirements in Nigeria

4. Data Sharing

We do not sell, rent, exchange, or disclose your personal information to third-party marketers or unrelated organizations.

5. Contact Us

If you have any questions regarding this Privacy Policy or how we process your data, please contact us at:

info@padupfoundation.org

Ending period poverty and empowering every girl's potential through menstrual hygiene support, education, and advocacy.
